name: Oneirophobia

abilities.name: Dreamscape
abilities.text: After this model succeeds in a (m) action, it may remove a Fright token from the target to deal +1 damage.

actions.name: Waking Scream
actions.effects: Enemy models within (aura) 2" of the target must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or be dealt 2 damage. Models with a Fright token suffer a (-) to this duel.

triggers.name: Woke Up Before I Hit the Ground
triggers.text: This model heals an amount equal to the target's health (maximum 5).

extraction_notes: The Waking Scream trigger has a bullet point indicator suggesting conditional/special timing
The resist value '-' in the table has been rendered as null since it indicates no resist stat
